requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority, NFPA 855 Reference Framework, and VINLEC Siting Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑管理局、NFPA 855参考框架及VINLEC选址要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築管理局、NFPA 855參考框架及VINLEC選址要求

summary.en: Fire safety and building approvals for BESS installations in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines fall under the jurisdiction of the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority and relevant parish-level regulatory bodies, operating within the national building code framework. Saint Vincent and the Grenadines has historically referenced Caribbean-adapted building standards informed by UK/IEC codes. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code and is widely referenced in OECS/Caribbean project specifications given Caribbean countries' familiarity with US-influenced insurance and engineering practice. VINLEC's interconnection requirements may impose additional siting, separation distance, and fire-suppression system requirements for grid-connected BESS. Formal national adoption of NFPA 855 for stationary BESS in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date — this is a high-priority gap requiring direct verification with the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority and VINLEC before project design is finalised. Additionally, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines hurricane-prone environment (peak risk June–November, Category 3+ storms possible) means BESS enclosures and outdoor installations must meet wind-load design requirements; IBC/ASCE 7 or equivalent Caribbean wind-load criteria are relevant for structural and fire-containment design of outdoor BESS cabinets.
summary.zh: 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯BESS装置的消防安全和建筑审批由圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑管理局及相关教区级监管机构负责，在国家建筑规范框架内运作。圣文森特和格林纳丁斯历史上参考经加勒比地区调适、融合英国/IEC规范的建筑标准。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是国际上占主导地位的BESS消防安装规范，鉴于加勒比地区国家熟悉受美国影响的保险和工程实践，在东加勒比国家组织（OECS）/加勒比地区项目规格中被广泛引用。VINLEC并网要求可能对并网BESS提出额外的选址、隔离距离和消防抑制系统要求。截至本数据集日期，圣文森特和格林纳丁斯针对固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认——这是一个高优先级差距，须在项目设计最终确定前直接向圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑管理局和VINLEC核实。此外，圣文森特和格林纳丁斯易受飓风影响（高峰风险期为6月至11月，可能遭遇3级以上飓风），BESS外壳和户外装置须满足风荷载设计要求；IBC/ASCE 7或等效的加勒比地区风荷载标准与户外BESS机柜的结构和防火围护设计相关。
summary.zht: 聖文森特和格林納丁斯BESS裝置的消防安全和建築審批由聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築管理局及相關教區級監管機構負責，在國家建築規範框架內運作。聖文森特和格林納丁斯歷史上參考經加勒比地區調適、融合英國/IEC規範的建築標準。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是國際上佔主導地位的BESS消防安裝規範，鑑於加勒比地區國家熟悉受美國影響的保險和工程實踐，在東加勒比國家組織（OECS）/加勒比地區項目規格中被廣泛引用。VINLEC併網要求可能對併網BESS提出額外的選址、隔離距離和消防抑制系統要求。截至本數據集日期，聖文森特和格林納丁斯針對固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認——這是一個高優先級差距，須在項目設計最終確定前直接向聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築管理局和VINLEC核實。此外，聖文森特和格林納丁斯易受颶風影響（高峰風險期為6月至11月，可能遭遇3級以上颶風），BESS外殼和戶外裝置須滿足風荷載設計要求；IBC/ASCE 7或等效的加勒比地區風荷載標準與戶外BESS機櫃的結構和防火圍護設計相關。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; formal adoption for stationary BESS in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority and VINLEC)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (widely referenced for fire suppression in commercial and industrial buildings in Caribbean jurisdictions)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (fire alarm system reference in Caribbean jurisdictions)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority — national authority for building permits and fire-safety compliance; verify BESS-specific requirements directly
VINLEC interconnection requirements — may impose BESS siting, separation distance, and fire-suppression design requirements for grid-connected installations

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory national standards and project-level fire-safety review by local fire authorities. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. GB/T 36544-2018 (Code for the Safety Requirements of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Station) addresses installation fire-safety at the station level. Project-level fire-safety review in China is conducted by local fire and emergency management authorities. Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Saint Vincent and the Grenadines building authorities or VINLEC as equivalent to NFPA 855-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for project review. Additionally, Chinese BESS enclosure standards (e.g., IP ratings under GB/T 4208) do not substitute for Caribbean hurricane wind-load and salt-corrosion design requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性国家标准和地方消防主管机关项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。GB/T 36544-2018（电化学储能电站安全规程）在电站层面规定安装消防安全要求。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防和应急管理主管机关开展。中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑主管机关或VINLEC认可为等同于基于NFPA 855的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在项目审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。此外，中国BESS外壳标准（如GB/T 4208 IP防护等级）不能替代加勒比地区飓风风荷载和盐腐蚀设计要求。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性國家標準和地方消防主管機關項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。GB/T 36544-2018（電化學儲能電站安全規程）在電站層面規定安裝消防安全要求。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防和應急管理主管機關開展。中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築主管機關或VINLEC認可為等同於基於NFPA 855的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在項目審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。此外，中國BESS外殼標準（如GB/T 4208 IP防護等級）不能替代加勒比地區颶風風荷載和鹽腐蝕設計要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 36544-2018 — 电化学储能电站安全规程 (Code for the Safety Requirements of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Station)

gap.en: Gap: Fire-safety installation approval from the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority is a mandatory project gate for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Saint Vincent and the Grenadines NFPA-referenced requirements. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority and VINLEC whether NFPA 855 has been formally adopted as the applicable standard for stationary BESS installations and determine any Saint Vincent and the Grenadines-specific derogations or additional requirements; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure fire-suppression system equipment is certified by an internationally recognised laboratory (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, or equivalent) where required by the building authority; (d) address Saint Vincent and the Grenadines tropical maritime environment — outdoor BESS installations must incorporate salt-mist corrosion protection (at minimum IEC 60068-2-52 Severity Level 3 or equivalent) and hurricane wind-load structural design; thermal management systems must be designed for sustained ambient temperatures of 30–35°C and high relative humidity; (e) engage a licensed building engineer and fire protection engineer familiar with Saint Vincent and the Grenadines building approval process before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
gap.zh: 差距：圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑管理局的消防安全安装审批是圣文森特和格林纳丁斯商业及工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足圣文森特和格林纳丁斯基于NFPA的要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑管理局和VINLEC确认NFPA 855是否已正式采纳为固定式BESS安装的适用标准，并确定任何圣文森特和格林纳丁斯专项豁免或额外要求；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保消防抑制系统设备在建筑管理局要求时经国际认可实验室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas或等效机构）认证；（d）应对圣文森特和格林纳丁斯热带海洋环境——户外BESS装置须纳入盐雾腐蚀防护（至少达到IEC 60068-2-52第3严酷等级或等效标准）和飓风风荷载结构设计；热管理系统须针对持续环境温度30–35°C和高相对湿度进行设计；（e）在确定系统布局或设备规格前，聘请熟悉圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑审批流程的持牌建筑工程师和消防工程师。
gap.zht: 差距：聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築管理局的消防安全安裝審批是聖文森特和格林納丁斯商業及工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足聖文森特和格林納丁斯基於NFPA的要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築管理局和VINLEC確認NFPA 855是否已正式採納為固定式BESS安裝的適用標準，並確定任何聖文森特和格林納丁斯專項豁免或額外要求；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保消防抑制系統設備在建築管理局要求時經國際認可實驗室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas或等效機構）認證；（d）應對聖文森特和格林納丁斯熱帶海洋環境——戶外BESS裝置須納入鹽霧腐蝕防護（至少達到IEC 60068-2-52第3嚴酷等級或等效標準）和颶風風荷載結構設計；熱管理系統須針對持續環境溫度30–35°C和高相對濕度進行設計；（e）在確定系統布局或設備規格前，聘請熟悉聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築審批流程的持牌建築工程師和消防工程師。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority approval is required for commercial and industrial BESS installations before commissioning; NFPA 855 adoption for stationary BESS specifically has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority and VINLEC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fire-safety installation approval from the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority is a mandatory gate for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Saint Vincent and the Grenadines NFPA-referenced fire-safety requirements. Engage the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Building Authority, VINLEC, and a licensed fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code (including whether NFPA 855 is formally adopted for stationary BESS), hurricane wind-load structural requirements, and tropical maritime environment design specifications before committing to system layout or equipment specification. BESS enclosures must be rated for coastal salt-mist exposure; thermal management must be designed for sustained tropical ambient conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑管理局的消防安全安装审批是圣文森特和格林纳丁斯商业及工业BESS装置的强制门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足圣文森特和格林纳丁斯基于NFPA的消防安全要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与圣文森特和格林纳丁斯建筑管理局、VINLEC及持牌消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范（包括NFPA 855是否已正式采纳用于固定式BESS）、飓风风荷载结构要求及热带海洋环境设计规格。BESS外壳须具备沿海盐雾防护等级；热管理系统须针对持续热带环境条件进行设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築管理局的消防安全安裝審批是聖文森特和格林納丁斯商業及工業BESS裝置的強制門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足聖文森特和格林納丁斯基於NFPA的消防安全要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與聖文森特和格林納丁斯建築管理局、VINLEC及持牌消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範（包括NFPA 855是否已正式採納用於固定式BESS）、颶風風荷載結構要求及熱帶海洋環境設計規格。BESS外殼須具備沿海鹽霧防護等級；熱管理系統須針對持續熱帶環境條件進行設計。
